conflict: Everything converges: the virus strikes during training, destroying a life and exposing every concealment
consequence: A real person is permanently destroyed; Margot's addiction and Yusuf's conspiracy both surface under crisis pressure; trust dissolves
must_land_beats: Tomas's blackout during hurdles: spinal impact, neural bridge destroyed, paralysis from the waist down
Margot in the feed during the crash—she experiences the impact at full sensory resolution and disconnects screaming
Kai discovers Yusuf's encrypted archive in the calibration bay
Yusuf reveals the virus's Meridian signatures and his belief that the virus was deliberately engineered

payoffs_to_land.description: Kai discovers Yusuf's unauthorized personal data archive
Margot's elevated heart-rate pushing during Tomas's session may have worsened his outcome
Yusuf shares his analysis—the virus appears to be Meridian-engineered

pressure_source: Everything converges: the virus strikes during training, destroying a life and exposing every concealment
secondary_character_beats: Tomas's injury is rendered as the destruction of a specific young life: his career, his family's income in Quito, his body's entire purpose, gone in a fraction of a second
state_shift: A real person is permanently destroyed; Margot's addiction and Yusuf's conspiracy both surface under crisis pressure; trust dissolves
